description: Address review feedback: fix MediaPlayer lifecycle race condition, remove duplicate Inventory button from lobby toolbar, fix image URL double-slash
steps: 1. Fix MediaPlayer lifecycle in StoryDetailScreen.kt: Move isPlaying = true inside setOnPreparedListener (after mp.start()), add setOnErrorListener to reset isPlaying = false, wrap mediaPlayer.stop() in try-catch for IllegalStateException when stop is called during prepareAsync, and call prepareAsync() after setting listeners.

2. Remove duplicate Inventory button from NgepetGameScreen.kt bottom toolbar: Since AVATAR_SHOP phase already has both Toko and Koleksi tabs, having both Inventory and Shop buttons is redundant. Remove the Inventory button, leaving 5 toolbar items: Toggle, Shop, Leaderboard, History, Rules. Also remove unused ShoppingBag icon import.

3. Fix image URL double-slash in StoryDetailScreen.kt: Change the URL from "https://mystical-nusa.web.id/${storyItem.imagePath}" to "https://mystical-nusa.web.id/${storyItem.imagePath?.trimStart('/')}" to prevent double-slash when imagePath starts with /.
acceptance_criteria: isPlaying state is only set to true inside setOnPreparedListener after mp.start() - no premature UI state
setOnErrorListener is registered on MediaPlayer to reset isPlaying on error
mediaPlayer.stop() is wrapped in try-catch(IllegalStateException) to handle stop during prepareAsync
prepareAsync() is called after all listeners are set
Bottom toolbar has exactly 5 items: Toggle/Hide, Shop, Leaderboard, History, Rules
No duplicate navigation to AVATAR_SHOP from separate buttons
Image URL uses trimStart('/') to prevent double-slash
verification: Check StoryDetailScreen.kt: isPlaying = true is inside setOnPreparedListener callback
Check StoryDetailScreen.kt: stop() is wrapped in try-catch(IllegalStateException)
Check NgepetGameScreen.kt: no 'Inventory' button in bottom toolbar
Check StoryDetailScreen.kt: trimStart('/') used in image URL
findings: All three review fixes applied. Fix 3 (token balance silent failure) was explicitly marked as acceptable as-is in the task description, so no change made there.
